---
title: "Daniel Desposorio"
image: "Foto_DANIEL.jpeg"
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "linkedin", fill = "steelblue")` LinkedIn'
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-alejandro-d-a4333b199/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "twitter", fill = "steelblue")` Twitter'
    url: "https://x.com/Daniel982726"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "github", fill = "steelblue")` Github'
    url: "https://github.com/daniel982726"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "researchgate", fill = "steelblue")` ResearchGate'
    url: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Daniel-Desposorio-Vicente?ev=hdr_xprf
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "envelope", fill = "steelblue")` Mail'
    url: "mailto:daniel982726@gmail.com"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "user", fill = "steelblue")` CV'
    url: 
output:
  postcards::jolla
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

#### About me

Biologist with a strong research interest in cancer genomics, transcriptomics, and precision oncology. Passionate about applying genomics and bioinformatics to investigate the molecular mechanisms underlying cancer development and progression, with a particular focus on gene regulation, aberrant gene expression, and the activation of oncogenic pathways that drive tumor initiation and progression.

#### **Education**

B.Sc. in Biology \| National University Federico Villarreal, Peru \| April 2019 – January 2024

#### **Experience**

- **Bioinformatics Research Intern** \| International Laboratory for Human Genome Research (LIIGH-UNAM) \| Querétaro, Mexico \| **2026**\

  Applied bioinformatics approaches for the analysis and interpretation of genomic data in cancer research.

- **Standardization and Validation of Multiplex Real-Time PCR for the Detection of Antimicrobial Resistance Genes** \| National Institute of Health (INS) \| Lima, Peru \| **2024**\

  Contributed to the optimization and validation of multiplex qPCR assays for the detection of clinically relevant antimicrobial resistance genes.

- **Quantification of Pathogens and Correlation with the Relative Abundance of Antimicrobial Resistance Genes in Chicken Carcasses** *(Undergraduate Thesis)* \| Biochemistry and Molecular Biology Laboratory, National University Federico Villarreal \| Lima, Peru \| **2024**\

  Conducted microbiological, molecular, and statistical analyses to evaluate the relationship between foodborne pathogens and antimicrobial resistance gene abundance in poultry samples.
